remarks: BEST AND FINAL 7/21 3:00PM. Welcome to #1 Wilton Acres, a masterfully reimagined South Wilton haven, where a classic style meets a breathtaking modern evolution. Step inside and immediately feel the light filled, open concept design.Transformed from the bottom up, this 4 Bedroom RR blends sleek sophistication with the warmth of a true forever home. Every upgrade has been thoughtfully redesigned - new, spacious sanctuary that is the Primary En suite addition. New 3rd garage bay for the car enthusiast. City Water. NEW Propane heat system. All bathrooms updated. NEW HVAC/Central Air. All redesigned with luxury finishes to elevate your daily living, offering a perfect sanctuary for a modern lifestyle. The fluid, open layout invites flexibility whether hosting dinner parties or enjoying quiet weekend mornings on your private, maintenance free Trex deck. This home offers turn key peace of mind with completely fenced in property, creating a secure private paradise where kids and pets can roam freely while keeping deer and other wildlife out to protect your professional landscaping. Main Level offers a formal LR with hardwood, formal Dining Space and beautiful EIK with SS appliances and granite counters. 3 Beds and 2 full Baths. Lower Level is finished with 4th Bedroom, Family Room with fireplace with sliders to under porch covered patio. Laundry Room and 1/2 Bath plus plenty of storage closets with direct access from 3 car garage. Just unpack to enjoy Award Winning schools and more!
